title: It All Comes with the Cold Water
original_title: It All Comes with the Cold Water
overview: When a young couple finds their love tested to the limits and whispers of infidelity grow louder, their delicate balance between love and career begins to crumble, forcing them to question whether they're truly meant to be together.
